§ The extended VE analysis included 44,889 total encounters, of which 1,295 (3%) involved case-patients.
¶ In this sensitivity VE analysis, the vaccinated group was children who received at least 1 2024–2025 dose, regardless of COVID-19 vaccination history; the comparator group was children with no receipt of a 2024–2025 dose, regardless of COVID-19 vaccination history. This analysis included 47,343 total encounters, of which 1,344 (3%) involved case-patients.
